base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dark_cave_torch_mask_small — a effect_layer from 1986 dragon quest. Small torch-light-mask overlay — ~3×3 tile visibility radius centered on party. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Small torch-light-mask overlay — ~3×3 tile visibility radius centered on party; rest of screen black. Used when Torch is lit (1 torch)
